zh.lifeSummary: 當William Browne於1505年1月25日出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親Edmund Browne12歲，母親Joan Cecil26歲。他於從1528年1月11日到1529年1月10日與Joan CECIL在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年1月25日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Browne于1505年1月25日出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，他的父亲Edmund Browne12岁，母亲Joan Cecil26岁。他于从1528年1月11日到1529年1月10日与Joan CECIL在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1566年1月25日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Browne was born on 25 January 1505, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Edmund Browne, was 12 and his mother, Joan Cecil, was 26. He married Joan CECIL from 11 January 1528 to 10 January 1529, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 January 1566, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Browne est né le 25 janvier 1505, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Browne, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Joan Cecil, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan CECIL du 11 janvier 1528 au 10 janvier 1529, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1566, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Browne am 25. Januar 1505 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Browne 12 und seine Mutter Joan Cecil 26. Er hat von 11. Januar 1528 bis 10. Januar 1529 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England Joan CECIL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1566 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Browne è nato il il 25 gennaio 1505 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Browne, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Joan Cecil, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan CECIL da 11 gennaio 1528 a 10 gennaio 1529, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1566, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Browneが1505年1月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父Edmund Browneは12歳，母Joan Cecilは26歳であった。から1528年1月11日まで1529年1月10日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでJoan CECILと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1566年1月25日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Browne(이)가 1505년 1월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Browne(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cecil(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1528년 1월 11일부터 1529년 1월 10일까지 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Joan CECIL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 1월 25일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.25 January 1505–25 January 1566: 25 de janeiro de 1505–25 de janeiro de 1566
pt.1528: de 11 de janeiro de 1528 a 10 de janeiro de 1529
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Browne nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1505, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Browne, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cecil, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan CECIL de 11 de janeiro de 1528 a 10 de janeiro de 1529, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1566, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Browne родился 25 января 1505 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Browne было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cecil, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan CECIL с 11 января 1528 по 10 января 1529 в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1566 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
